title: Luffy Battles Cracker
description: On pages 16–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Sanji, Ichiji, Niji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Luffy fights one of Big Mom’s Sweet Commanders while the rescue mission grows more dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Better late than never I guess...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: My beloved sons have all arrived!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't wait to see the look on Sanji's face when he sees them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The hell is this crap? Shouldn't he should be here to greet us first thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Well done on your mission, SIRS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We stand in awe and are left speechless at the fact that the two of you managed to quell the uprising that has been going on in broc Coli...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: second son of the Vinsmoke family "electric blue" Vinsmoke Niji

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: eldest son of the Vinsmoke family "sparking red" Vinsmoke ICHiji

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The Vinsmutes have all finally assembled!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 14 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
